evidence: standards/enterprise/modern-testing.md, ADR-0011, and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: An architecture-test gap requires the exact invariant, affected modules, manual review owner, expiry, and automation plan; it cannot justify a plugin-owned verifier façade.
statement: Executable repository boundaries with material regression risk MUST have focused architecture tests for dependency direction, forbidden imports, visibility, or equivalent enforceable invariants.
